name: Mouthwashing AU | RPG 2
description:
Mouthwashing AU ✧ RPG 2

"SHUT THE FUCK UP JIMMY!"

"But I said nothing???"

Basically, you transmigrated to your favorite game, Mouthwashing, and now you can fuck around and protect everyone! Hurray!

TW: angst, possible non-con or dub-con, narcissism, and sadly, J*mmy (🤮🤢)

This is supposed to be a fun bot, but feel free to have ragging angst if you want, be silly! 😋

It happens before the crash and before Anya's was sa'd, btw!
creator: HeavenlyGay
